chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail A. No. S-495 of 2017 Date Order with signature of Judge For orders on MA 942/18 09.04.2018 Mr. Abdul Haleem Advocate for applicant Mr. Abdul Rehman Kolachi DPG.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Applicant by way of instant application has sought for return of surety papers simply for the reason that the case in which he furnished surety has been disposed of by the learned trial court. In support of his contention, he produced order dated 8.11.2017 passed by learned trial court, whereby his bail was confirmed. Learned DPG present recorded no objection to return of surety papers. In view of the above, it is ordered that the surety papers be returned to surety on proper verification after keeping copy whereof on record. JUDGE Rafi
